meta.title: Ali Akbar — Supply Chain Specialist & Fulfillment Specialist
meta.description: Ali Akbar — Operations Manager with proven track record: 47% OPEX reduction, custom WMS build, multi-vendor ODM supply chain.
meta.ogTitle: Ali Akbar — Supply Chain Specialist & Fulfillment Specialist
meta.ogDescription: Operations Manager | 47% OPEX Reduction | Custom WMS Builder | Multi-vendor ODM Supply Chain | 87% Negotiation Success Rate.

about.lead: Operations Manager with one focus: costs down, systems running, team knows what to do.
paragraphs: Most concrete result: cut OPEX by 47% at Elfishaskin. No consultants, no borrowed frameworks. Just getting inside the actual process, building the WMS from zero, and fixing the BOM down to component level.

Started at PT Apac Inti Corpora in 2020 doing supply chain planning at Indonesia's largest integrated textile manufacturer. Moved to Rown Division in 2022 managing high-volume order operations, then stepped into the full Operations Manager role at Elfishaskin in 2025.

stats.headline: Proven Impact
stats.subtitle: Driving measurable results through systematic operations and data-driven decisions.

items.label: Inventory Accuracy
items.desc: Custom WMS replacing manual spreadsheet tracking

items.label: SKUs Handled
items.desc: Multi-SKU management across single & bundle products

experience.title: Operations Manager
experience.description: In just 1 year, achieved 47% OPEX reduction by rebuilding procurement workflows from scratch. Transformed warehouse from manual spreadsheet tracking to a fully digital WMS system. Restructured a chaotic procurement process into a systematic, data-driven operation. Successfully expanded warehouse capacity and implemented a spare ODM system to produce key components in-house, eliminating late stockouts and delayed shipments of finished goods. Managing 60+ SKUs across TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada with four teams: Procurement, Order Management, Product Development, and Warehouse.

experience.title: Order Management Specialist
experience.description: Full order lifecycle at one of Indonesia's largest local clothing brands — 30,000+ fashion items monthly, distribution reaching Singapore and Malaysia. On-time dispatch >98%, daily stock reconciliation, weekly ROP alerts, root-cause analysis on fulfillment bottlenecks.

experience.title: Junior Supply Chain Planner
experience.description: Indonesia's largest integrated textile manufacturer — 247-hectare facility, 5,000+ employees, exports to 74+ countries. Demand forecasting, inventory allocation, SLA monitoring, safety stock calculations, and ROP modeling at enterprise scale.

ribbons: DATA-DRIVEN DECISIONS ✦ COST OPTIMIZATION ✦ VENDOR MANAGEMENT

projects.headline: Work in Action
projects.subtitle: Real operations, real impact — from warehouse floor to quality control lab.

skills.headline: Skills & Expertise
skills.subtitle: Mastering end-to-end supply chain in a multi-vendor ODM model with no in-house production.

expertiseColumns.title: Supply Chain & Operations
expertiseColumns.description: Redesigning supply chain workflows from procurement to fulfillment. Custom WMS, BOM management, multi-vendor PO calendar, and cost controls at the component level.

expertiseColumns.title: Data Analysis & KPI
expertiseColumns.description: Data-driven operational analysis (Excel advanced, SQL, multi-SKU analytics). Defect tracking to Rupiah figures, KPI scorecards for 4 teams, demand forecasting with >85% accuracy target.

expertiseColumns.title: Leadership & Negotiation
expertiseColumns.description: Leading 4 functional teams. 87% vendor negotiation success rate backed by cost-of-defect data and market price benchmarks.

education.focus: Focus on organizational communication and stakeholder management.

supply-chain.title: End-to-End Supply Chain Strategy & Execution
supply-chain.desc: Managing the entire supply chain from procurement to final delivery. 5 vendor types, ODM model with no in-house production.
supply-chain.evidence: 5 vendor types (primary packaging, secondary packaging, stickers, hologram, ODM filling) managed simultaneously.

wms.title: Custom WMS Architecture & Implementation
wms.desc: Designed and built a custom Warehouse Management System from zero, replacing spreadsheet-based tracking.
wms.evidence: Inventory accuracy >99%, picking errors and misfulfillments dropped to near zero across 46 SKUs.

bom.title: Bill of Materials (BOM) Management
bom.desc: BOM management down to component level with Material Readiness Check (MRC) framework.
bom.evidence: MRC H-7 before every ODM filling schedule — last-minute component shortfalls eliminated.

procurement.title: Procurement & Multi-Vendor Management
procurement.desc: Multi-vendor procurement with data-driven negotiation using cost-of-defect figures and market price benchmarks.
procurement.evidence: 87% negotiation success rate across packaging, ODM, and logistics vendors.

forecasting.title: Demand Forecasting & Inventory Optimization
forecasting.desc: Demand forecasting with safety stock, ROP modeling, and campaign buffering at enterprise scale.
forecasting.evidence: Forecast accuracy target >85%. Methods learned at PT Apac Inti Corpora still inform every planning decision.

opex.title: OPEX Analysis & Cost Reduction
opex.desc: Identifying and eliminating operational waste through measurable process redesign.
opex.evidence: OPEX reduced by 47% — impact showed up directly in contribution margin and EBITDA.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Operations
warehouse.desc: Full warehouse workflow optimization: receiving, putaway, picking, packing, shipping.

omnichannel.title: Omnichannel Order Lifecycle Management
omnichannel.desc: Managing full order lifecycle across multiple marketplace channels simultaneously.

data-analysis.title: Operational Data Analysis & Reporting
data-analysis.desc: Finding insights and bottlenecks through operational data analysis.
data-analysis.evidence: Built a defect tracking system that converts defect rates into Rupiah figures.

kpi.title: KPI Design & OKR Framework Implementation
kpi.desc: Designing measurable KPIs for every operational function.
kpi.evidence: Scorecards for 4 teams: fulfillment >99%, vendor OTD >95%, forecast >85%, NPD on-time >85%.

npd.title: New Product Development Coordination
npd.desc: Coordinating NPD across procurement, packaging, and ODM filling schedules.

sla.title: SLA Management & E-Commerce Fulfilment
sla.desc: Ensuring SLA compliance across all marketplace channels.
